creator: n@nectar.com
text:
This diff fixes the errors and warnings emitted by
portlint.

Jacques Vidrine <n@nectar.com>

--- Makefile    1998/06/12 05:01:30     1.1
+++ Makefile    1998/06/22 02:09:14     1.2
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 # Date created:                                6/11/1998
 # Whom:                                        n@nectar.com
 #
-# $Id: Makefile,v 1.1 1998/06/12 05:01:30 nectar Exp $
+# $Id: Makefile,v 1.2 1998/06/22 02:09:14 nectar Exp $
 #
 
 DISTNAME=              hesiod-3.0.2
@@ -18,10 +18,8 @@
                        hesiod_free_servent.3 hesiod_getmailhost.3      \
                        hesiod_getpwnam.3 hesiod_getpwuid.3             \
                        hesiod_getservbyname.3 hesiod_init.3            \
-                       hesiod_resolve.3 hesiod_to_bind.3               
+                       hesiod_resolve.3 hesiod_to_bind.3
 MAN5=                  hesiod.conf.5
-
-
 
 HAS_CONFIGURE=         YES
 GNU_CONFIGURE=         YES
